import subprocess, os, glob

base = os.path.expanduser\("~"\) + "/Desktop/새 폴더"

# Nougat for math-heavy PDFs \(ml, dl, ds\)
nougat_dirs = ["ml", "dl", "ds"]
for d in nougat_dirs:
    folder = os.path.join\(base, d\)
    pdfs = glob.glob\(os.path.join\(folder, "*.pdf"\)\)
    for pdf in pdfs:
        print\(f"[NOUGAT] {os.path.basename\(pdf\)}"\)

# Marker for text-heavy PDFs
marker_dirs = ["sf", "BA", "psycology", "linguistics", "governance", "ontology"]
for d in marker_dirs:
    folder = os.path.join\(base, d\)
    pdfs = glob.glob\(os.path.join\(folder, "*.pdf"\)\)
    for pdf in pdfs:
        print\(f"[MARKER] {os.path.basename\(pdf\)}"\)

print\(f"\\nTotal files to convert"\)
PYEOF)

import os, glob
base = os.path.expanduser\('~'\) + '/Desktop/새 폴더'
dirs = ['sf', 'BA', 'psycology', 'linguistics', 'governance', 'ontology', 'ml', 'dl', 'ds']
for d in dirs:
    folder = os.path.join\(base, d\)
    for pdf in glob.glob\(os.path.join\(folder, '*.pdf'\)\):
        name = os.path.splitext\(os.path.basename\(pdf\)\)[0]
        if not os.path.exists\(os.path.join\(folder, name + '_full.md'\)\):
            print\(f'{d}/{os.path.basename\(pdf\)}'\)
")

Bash(C:/Users/kmkim/AppData/Local/miniconda3/envs/blog/python.exe -c "
import os, glob
base = os.path.expanduser\('~'\) + '/Desktop/새 폴더'
dirs = ['sf', 'BA', 'psycology', 'ml', 'dl', 'ds']
total_mb = 0
for d in dirs:
    for pdf in glob.glob\(os.path.join\(base, d, '*.pdf'\)\):
        name = os.path.splitext\(os.path.basename\(pdf\)\)[0]
        if not os.path.exists\(os.path.join\(base, d, name + '_full.md'\)\):
            size = os.path.getsize\(pdf\) / 1024 / 1024
            total_mb += size
            print\(f'{size:6.1f}MB  {d}/{os.path.basename\(pdf\)}'\)
print\(f'\\nTotal: {total_mb:.0f}MB, 15 files'\)
")
